entity.label: Jahaziel

entity.description: A priest who accompanied the removal of the ark to Jerusalem (1 Chr. 16:6).

nodes.label: Jahaziel
nodes.description: A priest who accompanied the removal of the ark to Jerusalem (1 Chr. 16:6).

verses.text: Benaiah also and Jahaziel the priests with trumpets continually before the ark of the covenant of God.
